hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext: STANDING WORKFLOW DEFAULT (user preference, applies every session): For any substantive multi-step implementation task - anything that warrants a written plan or spans multiple files or components - default to Subagent-Driven Development: brainstorm -> write a spec -> write a phased plan -> execute via fresh subagents (one per task) with a spec+quality review gate after each task, plus a whole-branch review at the end. Use the superpowers skills brainstorming, writing-plans, and subagent-driven-development for this. Deploy MULTIPLE agents in PARALLEL whenever subtasks are independent and file-disjoint - launch them in isolated git worktrees so they do not collide on the git index or build output, then merge each back. Keep trivial single-step changes inline with no ceremony. This is a default, not a mandate - the user may override it for any given task.
